# Death Clock

> Death Clock is a free, privacy-first life expectancy calculator and live countdown. It is an educational and entertainment tool, not medical advice or an individual death prediction.

Canonical URL: https://jonathanpark.dev/deathclock/

## What the calculator does

- Selects a population life expectancy baseline using birth year, country, and biological sex.
- Offers an optional 2021 state-level refinement for users in the United States.
- Applies broad population-level modifiers for smoking, exercise, alcohol consumption, and BMI category.
- Displays an estimated date, live countdown, time lived, and a transparent modifier breakdown.

## Data and methodology

- WHO Global Health Observatory country and sex-specific life expectancy data.
- Our World in Data historical life expectancy data.
- CDC/NCHS U.S. State Life Tables for 2021.
- Full methodology and modifier values: https://jonathanpark.dev/deathclock/README.md

## Privacy and limitations

- All answers and calculations remain in browser memory; there is no account, analytics, cookie, or persistent storage.
- Inputs are not transmitted to the site owner, sponsors, or third parties.
- Results are population-level estimates and must not be presented as medical advice or a factual prediction.
- Privacy policy: https://jonathanpark.dev/deathclock/PRIVACY.md
